safety_rules.purpose: Inspect, prepare, document, and escalate Smart Manikin site issues safely and consistently.
scope: ALLCPR Smart Manikin Learning Station site inspection and readiness workflows.
AUTOCPR Training Center / ICPIS staff workflows, quick readiness checks, troubleshooting, escalation, and reference-only site/travel workflows.
Section 21 site access directory is staff-only and redacted from committed structured files.
core_rules: Check the site, clean lightly when allowed, document what you find, and report issues.
Take before photos before cleaning, moving, fixing, or organizing anything.
Do not repair, open, rewire, dismantle, or force equipment, doors, locks, keypads, lockboxes, or electrical/network infrastructure.
Do not guess, reveal, or share access codes, lockbox codes, Wi-Fi passwords, staff PINs, or access photos.
Do not use old, staged, or replacement photos as inspection evidence.
Escalate safety, access, lease, refund, insurance, cost, legal, facility-power, and unresolved technical issues.
Staff never self-approve refunds, reschedules, compensation, leases, cost commitments, insurance terms, legal decisions, or safety exceptions.

steps.title: Arrive and pause before touching setup
steps.check: Look at the whole room and the Smart Manikin station first. Do not clean, move, fix, or organize anything yet.
steps.evidence: None yet; prepare to photograph the site in its found state.

steps.title: Take before photos first
steps.check: Photograph the site before any cleaning or organizing: whole room; Smart Manikin area; supplies / consumables area; door or signage; any abnormal / problem area.
steps.evidence: Before photos of the required areas.

steps.title: Table / station pre-check
steps.check: Before moving anything, compare the station to Figure 1 and confirm iPad, Smart Manikin(s), AED Training Pads, consumables area, tissues/simulated gauze if supplied, disinfecting wipes, disposable gloves, mask adaptors, optional face shield, Pocket Mask, BVM, iPad power, Smart Manikin power, and standard placement / not scattered.
steps.evidence: Mark each item Present / Missing / Problem and photograph any missing or problem item if safe.

steps.title: Cleanliness check
steps.check: Check overall hygiene. Empty trash and replace the bag if needed. Keep the floor clean and clear visible mess.
steps.evidence: Cleanliness status recorded as OK / fixed / problem.

steps.title: Supplies check
steps.check: Confirm disinfecting supplies are enough for one week. Disinfect teaching equipment. Note low or missing consumables such as wipes, gloves, and mask adaptors.
steps.evidence: Supplies status and low/missing consumables recorded.

steps.title: Equipment check
steps.check: Check Smart Manikin, iPad, AED Pads, BVM, and Pocket Mask are complete and working. Confirm iPad and Smart Manikin are connected to power and equipment is in the standard position.
steps.evidence: Equipment status recorded; photo of broken or unresponsive device if safe.

steps.title: Access / camera / Wi-Fi / signage / safety checks
steps.check: Check door access status, camera online status, Wi-Fi status, signs/instructions, and visible water/electric/equipment hazards. Do not expose codes in the workflow.
steps.evidence: Access / camera / Wi-Fi / signage / safety status recorded.

steps.title: Safe-only fixes
steps.check: If an issue can be safely fixed on site, fix it and document what you did. If not, take photos and report promptly.
steps.evidence: Action taken recorded; before/after photos of the fix if any.

steps.title: Take after photos
steps.check: After inspection and cleaning are complete, photograph the site again from similar angles: whole room; Smart Manikin area; supplies area; door or signage; corrected result if an issue was fixed.
steps.evidence: After photos of the required areas.

steps.title: Complete the Weekly Site Check Report
steps.check: Fill the Weekly Site Check Report fields: header, weekly status items, required photos, issues found, local promotion update, and weekly confirmation.
steps.evidence: Completed Weekly Site Check Report, truthful and complete.

steps.title: Upload / report completion
steps.check: Upload before photos, after photos, the completed report, and issue photos to the correct per-site Google Drive folder. The app records upload completed but does not manage Google Drive.
steps.evidence: Upload/report completion recorded; confirm correct folder with staff when needed.

steps.title: Final log
steps.check: Set final status: completed if no unresolved issue remains, needs_support if unresolved issue remains, or safety_escalation for safety issues. Include missing/problem counts.
steps.evidence: Final status recorded with missing/problem counts.

do_not: Do not clean, move, fix, or organize before before photos.
Do not repair, dismantle, rewire, force doors, guess codes, or use old/staged photos.
Do not self-approve safety, access, lease, refund, insurance, cost, or legal decisions.

students_do: Submit a quick report for staff review.
students_do_not: Do not force entry or use staff-only access.
Do not move, reset, repair, or dismantle equipment.
Do not handle the Weekly Site Check Report, Google Drive upload, passcodes, lockbox codes, cleaning duties, or supply duties.
quick_7_point_check: Does the room look safe and usable?
Can you see the Smart Manikin / iPad station?
Does the Smart Manikin look connected/usable?
Submit quick report for staff review.

steps: Take before photos first.
Compare the station to the reference image.
Check the table layout and required items are all present.
Check the tablet / iPad is present and charging.
Check the manikin / equipment placement matches the standard.
Check supplies: consumables, disinfecting items, and rescue-breathing items.
Photograph any missing or broken item.
Report the issue in the Weekly Site Check Report.

power: Keep manikins plugged in throughout the course
Keep Smart Manikin / iPad in standard position
rescue_breathing_equipment: Bag-Valve Mask / BVM optional; use if mask adaptors are unavailable

table_station_setup.caution: Reference only; do not repair or dismantle equipment.

steps: Confirm visible charging / power connection.
Confirm tablet / iPad is connected to power.
Wait briefly for a charging or power indicator.
If still unusable, take photo evidence of the screen, cable, and power/charging state.
Mark / report the station or device as not ready.
Include the issue in the inspection / Weekly Site Check Report.
do_not: Do not open the device.
Do not repair, dismantle, replace parts, or handle unsafe electrical parts.
Do not invent reset/calibration steps.
escalation: Escalate to ALLCPR support/staff and engineer/vendor; notify supervisor if class is affected.
tablet_power.documented_fix_status: No documented power fix is recorded for tablet/iPad power, battery, charging, or power-on issues.

steps: Reload / refresh once and wait.
If fixed, continue and note it.
If not fixed, record issue; no documented fix is recorded.
Save photo/video of black screen or restart, exact time, course step, and power/display/Bluetooth/tablet-PAD status.
do_not: Do not invent browser/device repair steps.
Do not try undocumented reset/recovery/calibration.
escalation: Escalate to engineer/vendor; notify supervisor if class is affected.

use_for: PAD connected but training shows no data
steps: Identify the issue: will not connect vs connected but no training data.
Keep manikin and PAD powered with power strip.
If still will not connect while plugged in, use only the source-recorded manikin restart step.
Remember: when powered-but-unplugged, PAD may show connected but TRAINING receives no data.
If unresolved, save photo/video of connected/no-data state and exact symptom/time.
do_not: Do not dismantle.
Do not invent unsupported reset, calibration, permission, Wi-Fi, or browser fixes.
escalation: Document and escalate to engineer/vendor; notify supervisor if class is affected.

steps: Check browser/camera permission only if the SOP supports it for the situation, such as a basic in-app permission prompt.
If unresolved, capture the exact error text / screenshot.
do_not: Do not reinstall, re-flash, change devices, or perform unsupported technical fixes.
escalation: Document and escalate to engineer/vendor / tech support; notify supervisor if class is affected.
camera_browser_permission.documented_fix_status: No documented device-session permission fix is recorded beyond a basic supported in-app permission prompt.

steps: Confirm scope: one device, room/building network, or course/platform.
If authorized, confirm site network device has power; otherwise contact venue/property/tech.
Capture Wi-Fi/network errors, loading failures, and exact error text.
do_not: Do not change unauthorized network equipment.
Do not promise restore/refund/reschedule/compensation before approval.
escalation: Escalate venue/property for site-network; supervisor/tech for platform/system.

steps: Safety first: confirm no fire, smoke, burning smell, shock, injury, or unsafe dark-room movement.
Confirm scope: one room, whole building, or surrounding area.
Ask venue/property to inspect/reset authorized electrical equipment and estimate restore time.
Prepare escalation packet: outage start time, class/site, affected headcount, evidence, venue response, and whether class can continue.
do_not: Do not handle unsafe electrical parts.
Do not operate breakers.
Do not rewire or repair outlets.
Do not promise restore/refund/reschedule/compensation before approval.

steps: Do not force doors, locks, keypads, or lockboxes.
Confirm location / room if safe.
Document arrival time and every attempt.
Report to ALLCPR staff / supervisor.
Mark site/session not ready if access is blocked.
Never reveal or guess codes.
do_not: Do not force doors/locks/keypads/lockboxes.
Do not reveal, guess, or share codes.
escalation: If access fails, contact venue/property, then supervisor if class delayed.

steps: Treat unexpected logout/reset/timer behavior like Section 8.
Document the behavior and escalate.
Escalate to ALLCPR support to confirm whether expected before telling students it is normal.
do_not: Do not invent a fix.
Do not call it normal unless ALLCPR confirms it.

steps: Take photo evidence.
Note exact item missing, damaged, or dirty.
Do safe-only cleanup if SOP allows.
Report in Weekly Site Check Report and to ALLCPR if it cannot be fixed on site.
do_not: Do not repair or dismantle damaged equipment.
escalation: Escalate anything you cannot restock or safely resolve.

weekly_site_status_items: iPad / tablet is present and charging
AED pads / BVM / pocket mask are present
Camera is online and not blocked
issues_found: no issue / minor issue / urgent issue
local_promotion_update: local promotion/articles/Eventbrite/community posts/partner outreach this week
weekly_site_check_report.weekly_confirmation: Site checked, cleaned, and reviewed for basic operation readiness; add name and date.
weekly_site_check_report.upload_destination: Per-site Google Drive folder, not managed by app; workflow records upload completed and needs staff confirmation of correct folder.
do_not: Do not leave report incomplete.
Do not enter false info.
Do not upload old/staged photos.

new_site_assessment_reference.core_principle: Region first, then site; information first, then judgment.
new_site_assessment_reference.open_site_test_threshold: CPS ads 3 days including weekday and weekend; Google Ads 7 days; >5 signups in a week or 10 total may open, otherwise management decides.
hard_elimination_conditions: Access control cannot be installed or students cannot enter in a controlled way.
Camera cannot be installed or cover entrance and equipment area.
Wi-Fi/network cannot meet equipment needs and cannot be fixed by installing network.
Landlord/property uncooperative or limits access/camera/signage/equipment placement.
Educational/training use not allowed or lease terms block operation.
Room size, flow, or environment clearly unsuitable for independent student training.
do_not: Do not self-approve lease, cost, renovation, equipment purchase, insurance, liability, safety, or operations decisions.

mileage.reimbursed_miles: Only miles beyond the first 20 each way.

escalation_matrix.staff_can_do: Confirm on charge; save evidence; mark not ready.
escalation_matrix.staff_must_not_do: Open, repair, replace parts, handle unsafe electrical parts.
escalation_matrix.escalate_when: Will not power on/charge after confirming power.

escalation_matrix.staff_can_do: Reload/refresh once and wait; save evidence.
escalation_matrix.staff_must_not_do: Invent browser/device repair or reset steps.

escalation_matrix.staff_can_do: Keep manikin + PAD powered; source-recorded restart only.
Check basic in-app permission prompt; capture error text.
Confirm scope; capture error evidence; authorized power check only.
Confirm safety/scope; ask venue to inspect/reset; build packet.
Confirm location; record attempts; mark session not ready.
escalation_matrix.staff_must_not_do: Force doors/locks; guess or share codes.

escalation_matrix.staff_can_do: Restock what you have; note and photograph.
escalation_matrix.staff_must_not_do: Make a student responsible for staff restocking.

escalation_matrix.staff_can_do: Photograph; note exact item; mark not ready.

escalation_matrix.issue_type: Refund / cost / insurance / lease / safety / legal

troubleshooting_index.user_says: PAD connected but no training data
what should be on the desk

safe_figures.source_section_page: Section 6 / Figure 1; Smart Manikin site-inspection SOP page 3
safe_figures.title: Smart Manikin Figure 1 — equipment placement diagram / standard equipment placement reference
safe_figures.what_it_shows: Standard Smart Manikin table/station placement: iPad, manikins, AED Training Pads, consumables, Pocket Mask, and BVM.
safe_figures.when_to_show: Table / station pre-check, equipment placement, supplies check, and desk/table layout questions.
safe_figures.caution: Reference only; do not repair or dismantle equipment.

safe_figures.title: Smart Manikin Figure 2 — Example floor setup
safe_figures.what_it_shows: Example floor setup with manikin, BVM, pocket mask, AED pads, and tablet stand.
safe_figures.when_to_show: Station layout, equipment placement, and rescue-breathing item questions.
safe_figures.caution: Reference only; do not repair or dismantle equipment.

safe_figures.title: Smart Manikin Figure 3 — Tablet home screen with two training apps
safe_figures.what_it_shows: Tablet home screen with Adult and Pediatric First Aid/CPR/AED and BLS Healthcare Provider training apps.
safe_figures.when_to_show: Student quick readiness and app launch questions.
safe_figures.caution: Use only to identify the expected app screen; do not change device settings.

safe_figures.title: Smart Manikin Figure 4 — Normal Login / Continue screen
safe_figures.what_it_shows: Normal login / Continue screen expected when the app loads correctly.
safe_figures.when_to_show: Black tab, app not loading, or login/continue screen questions.
safe_figures.caution: Reference only; if a black tab remains after one reload, document and escalate.

safe_figures.title: Smart Manikin Figure 5 — Example session screen with Bluetooth / Submit / Pass
safe_figures.what_it_shows: Example session screen with Bluetooth, Call Support, Exit, Submit, and Adult / Infant Pass controls.
safe_figures.when_to_show: Bluetooth, session, Submit, Pass, and completion evidence questions.
safe_figures.caution: Reference only; do not infer certificate eligibility or repair steps from the image.

section_21_site_access_directory.handling: Live site access codes, lockbox codes, Wi-Fi passwords, staff PINs, and site access/wayfinding photos must stay in staff-gated local credential/access logic and must not be sent to AI payloads.
